metadata.consulate: Consulate General of India, San Francisco

vfs_center.name: VFS Global San Francisco
vfs_center.address: 642 Harrison Street, Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94107

fees_usd.payment_notes: 3.75% convenience fee for card; money order payable to 'VFS Services (USA) Inc'

source_cgisf.tatkal: 5 working days from receipt at Consulate
source_cgisf.normal: 30 working days from receipt at Consulate

processing_times.note: All times subject to clear Police Verification Report (PVR)

eligible_if: Valid US visa status (H1B, F1, Green Card, I-797, etc.)

application_steps: 2. Fill online form on embassy.passportindia.gov.in, note ARN
3. Complete VFS application using ARN, pay fees
6. Submit physical packet by mail or walk-in to 642 Harrison St Suite 200

mandatory: Copy of US legal status (visa page, Green Card, EAD, I-797)
Proof of US address (Driver license, state ID, utility bill <3 months, lease, or university letter)
conditional: Annexure D (not required for adult, for reference)

special_rules.students: Can apply up to 2 years before expiry (others 1 year)
special_rules.minors: Validity 5 years or till 18; ages 15-18 may opt for 10 years
special_rules.lost_passport: Cannot use Tatkal; requires police report
special_rules.address_for_pvr: Must provide Indian address with police station, district, PIN for verification
